occupation: Director, Enterprise Solutions APAC at Vistar Media
headline: Experienced digital media professional - Director, Enterprise Solutions @ Vistar Media
location_str: Surry Hills, New South Wales, Australia

experiences.title: Director, Enterprise Solutions APAC
experiences.description: Vistar Media offers a complete end-to-end programmatic ecosystem to help businesses get the most out of digital out-of-home media. This includes a demand-side platform (DSP), supply-side platform (SSP), and digital signage software (our ad server and content management system, Cortex) — all integrated together to enable data-driven, automated, measurable DOOH transactions.

experiences.title: CEO and Founder
experiences.description: A better golfing experience. From new entrants to golf to lapsed players to expert mastering their skills – Playfair is the go-to destination to get better at golf in a way more in line with today’s world. Playfair creates a unique experience by combining word-class technology and training expertise to create a welcoming and convenient environment for developing each and every player’s golfing potential. Ultimately we facilitate a new sense of community, fun and accessibility in the world of golf. Playfair offers a range of products and services including individual and group lessons, custom programs, unassisted sessions and the best golf related retail in Australia.

experiences.title: Senior Director, Agency Relations
experiences.description: Amobee is a technology company that transforms the way brands and agencies make marketing decisions. The Amobee Marketing Platform enables marketers to plan and activate cross channel, programmatic media campaigns using real-time market research, proprietary audience data, advanced analytics, and more than 150 integrated partners, including Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, Snapchat and Twitter.

experiences.title: Account Executive
experiences.description: Turn delivers real-time insights that transform the way leading advertising agencies and enterprises make decisions. Our digital advertising hub enables audience planning, media execution, and real-time analytics from a single login, and provides point-and-click access to more than 150 integrated marketing technology partners. Turn is headquartered in Silicon Valley and provides its products and services worldwide. For more information, visit turn.com or follow @turnplatform.

experiences.title: General Manager
experiences.description: Coates is a global leader in digital merchandising for the retail industry with both software and hardware offerings. The group employs over 100 people globally with operations in the US, Australia, China, India and Japan. Key clients include McDonald's, YUM Brands and Burger King.
